events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: ladder reinforcement spacing exceeded in block/brick laying, rough-complete stage. Reference TMS 402/602. Ladder reinforcement (joint reinforcement) spacing exceeded means spacing is too large, non-compliant. Decision: fail. Risk: medium-high. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 80. Value: not given numeric. Confidence high.
